chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6157 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 10.02.2025 Ms. Fouzia Rasheed, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Mohabbat Hussain Awan, advocate for the respondents 6 & 7. Mr. Javed Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Nadir Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Petition is pending since 2022 for orders as to maintainability. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that final assessment order has already been passed. While the same is assailable in statutory hierarchy. No case could be articulated for direct recourse to writ jurisdiction in the presence of adequate remedy having been provided under the law. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
